title: MUSES
description: In Luo culture,the agwata known as the calabash was and still more than a vessel.Once central to daily life, used for porridge and water, it also stood proudly as a decorative center piece in ceremonies. Today it emerges as a fashion muse , a sculptural symbol that bridges traditions and mordernity.It carved patterns,speaked of ancestry
